content_en:
Abu Dardaa (ra) reported the Apostle of Allah BE said: “On the Day of Judgement you will be called by your names and your father’s names so give your children good names. v3

As for the unanswered question, what will happen to the illegitimate children who were falsely attributed to the wrong fathers by their mothers? The answer can be found in the above hadith related by Abu Dawud i.e. they will be called by their own names rather than their fathers’ names.

There will always be different opinions about this issue because some hadith scholars graded the hadith of Abu Dawud

"3 Sunan Abu Dawud (English trans.) Vol. 3. p. 1377, No. 4930.

HADITH 52 The aubergine (eggplant) is a cure for all ailments. Classified fabricated by Ibn Hajar AJ Asqalaani.

This fabricated hadith contradicts the authentic saying of the Holy Prophet : “The black seed is a cure for all diseases except As-Saam.” Aisha (ra) asked: “What is as-Saam”? He, the Holy Prophet said: “ Death ”

Let the most handsome among you lead the prayer (salah) because it is more likely that he will be the best in character and use your wealth to safeguard your honour and safeguard your deen by guarding your tongue.

Related by Ibn Adee, classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

He who travels on Jumu’ah day shall have two angels invoking Allah against him, that he should have no one accompanying him on his journey and that he should not accomplish whatever aim and objective he set out to accomplish.

* Sahih Bukhari (Arabic/ English ) Vol. 7, P. 400 No. 591

Related by al Khataab and classified fabricated by adhDhahaabee and Ibn Hibbaan.

There is no authentic tradition that forbids a Muslim from travelling on Jumu’ah day. Thus, if a Muslim has needs to take care of, there is no sin on him if he travels on Jumu’ah day. This fabricated khabar contradicts an authentic athar in which Umar Ibn al Khattaab (ra) saw a man dressed for a journey. The man then said in the presence of Umar (ra), if today weren’t Friday I would have travelled. Umar (ra) heard him and said: “You may travel because Friday doesn’t prevent anyone from travelling. vila

According to Islamic Jurisprudence Salatul Jumu’ah is not compulsory on a traveller. The traveller also has the choice of fasting or breaking his fast, and to shorten and join his prayers. He may wipe over his socks for three days and nights.

Verily for everything there is a heart, and the heart of the Qur’an is Surah Yaa-Sin, he who reads it once will have the reward of reading the Qur’an ten times.

Related by ad-Daarimee 2/456 and classified fabricated by Ibn Abee Haatim.

There is another Hadith that says: “Recite Surah YaaSin over your dead”- this khabar was classified weak by AdDaar Qutnee.!'*

"4 Tpn Abee Shaybah Vol. 2, p. 205Classified Sahih. "S See Kitaab Fadhaa’il Al A’maal by Diyaa-udeen Al Maqdisee: p. 148.

However it is permissible to pray salatul Janaazah over a deceased person who is already inside the grave. Standing by the grave of the deceased while praying over him or her is also permissible, but this can lead to shirk.

He who charges a fee for teaching the Qur’an to others, then that will be his only reward in regards to the Qur’an.

Related by Abu Na’eem and classified fabricated by adhDhahaabee.

The above mentioned fabricated hadith gives the impression that it’s not allowed for a person who teaches others the recitation of the Holy Qur’an to charge a fee for his service. This view is unacceptable because the Islamic worker has needs like everyone else. The Islamic worker is not an angel and thus he or she needs food, clothing, shelter, medicine etc.

Moreover we have an authentic hadith in Sahih Al-Bukhari, which contradicts this fabricated khabar. Narrated Sahl Bin Sa’d as-Sa’idi: “While I was sitting among the people in the company of Allah's Apostle #2 a woman stood up and said, O Allah’s Apostle, I have given myself in marriage to you; please give your opinion of me. The Prophet 25 did not give her any reply. She again stood up and said, O Allah's Apostle! I have given myself in marriage to you so please give your opinion of me. The Prophet “325 did not give her any reply. She again stood for the third time and said: I have given myself in marriage to you so please give your opinion of me. So a man stood up and said: O Allah's Apostle! Marry her to me. The Prophet 2% asked him, have you got anything? He said: No. The Prophet 2 said: Go

and search for something, even if it were an iron ring. The man went and searched and then returned saying: I could not find anything not even an iron ring. Then the Prophet 32 said: Do you know something of the Quran by heart? He replied: I know such Surah and such Surah. The Prophet 5 said: Go! I have married you to her for what you know of the Quran by heart i.e. for you to teach hre the Quran. NG

In the above mentioned hadith the Prophet 3 had married a woman to a man who was penniless and could not afford a mahr (dowry). Since the Holy Prophet = married her to him for him to teach her what he knew of the Qur’an, this is clear evidence that it is permissible to charge a fee for teaching others the recitation of the Holy Qur’an. This was the position of the great scholars of Islam: Imam Shafee, Malik, al-Hasan, Ataa, Ishaaq and many more. Imam Nawawi has cited this view in his book Sharh Sahih Muslim'’” and said Al Qaadi Iyaad was also of this opinion due to the above-mentioned Hadith in Sahih Bukhari and Muslim. This hadith also proves the permissibility of a woman proposing to a man.

wudu on top of wudu is light on top of light.

Related by Imam Gazaali in Ihyaa 1/135 and classified fabricated by al Mandharee

Backbiting nullifies one’s wudu and salah.

"6 Sahih Bukhari (Arabic/.English) Vol. 7. p. 59, No. 79. 7 See Shar Sahih Muslim Vol. 9, p. 214By Imam Nawawi.

Related by Abu Na’eem and classified fabricated by Ad-Daar Qutnee and Al Haakim.

Verily it is the non-Arabic speaking nations that do this (i.e. kissing the hands of their kings) and I Muhammad “2 am nota king. I am but a man from among you.

Related by Ibn Adee and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

The above-mentioned fabricated khabar gives the false impression that the practice of kissing the hands of respected people like Shaikhs, parents, teachers etc, is not allowed in Islam. However this practice is allowed in Islam and should not be deemed a bid’ah because there are authentic traditions stating that: some of the companions of the Holy Prophet #5 kissed his hands on a few occasions and he did not object to it.'"*

It is not permissible for a woman to kiss the hand of her Shaikh because when Hind the wife of Abu Sufyaan asked the Holy Prophet “3 why don’t you shake our hands the way you shake hands with the men when they were giving you their Baiah? He replied: “/ don’t shake hands with women.”

The mistake of Prophet David was in his lust.

"8 See Adab Al Mufrad by Imam Bukhari p. 142.

Related by Abu Na’eem and classified fabricated by Imam Suyooti and Adh-Dhahaabee who said a liar by the name of Ahmad Ibn Ishaaq was found in the chain of transmitters.

The explanation of the above hadith is famous in Jewish and Christian circles. Thus they claim that Dawud *5!) saw the body of a woman called Batsheeba as she was taking a bath and he was overwhelmed with her remarkable beauty; so he enquired about her and requested that her husband should be placed on the front line of the battlefield to be killed by the enemies so that he will be able to marry his wife, which he did when her husband died.

The scholars of Islam agree unanimously among themselves that this story is from the Israeeliyaat (i.e. saying of the Jews) and not a Hadith of the Holy Prophet 2%. It is not our creed as Muslims to insult and slander any of the Prophets of Islam whether it be Muhammad 2 or any of the previous Prophets of Allah. It is not befitting of a Prophet to lust much less to cause the death of someone in order to satisfy his own lust. We as Muslims believe that the Prophets of Allah were all infallible. Meaning they did not commit a sin deliberately. Whatever slip they committed was merely a mistake and not a deliberate sin like Musa =! slaying of the Coptic Soldier in Egypt.

Anyone who insults or slanders any of the Prophets of Allah 5% becomes a Kafir and deserves to be killed if he is living in an Islamic sate. The insulter is killed whether he is a Muslim, Christian or Jew because to insult a Prophet is to insult Allah 3%. Anyone who insults Aisha (ra) and accused her of zina even though Allah 3% .has declared her innocent of this charge in Surah Noor verse 17 becomes a kafir and deserves to be killed wherever in the world he might be living.

As for those who insult Abu Bakr (ra), Umar (ra) or any other Sahaabah they are to be flogged and if they repent they are released from prison; if not they are imprisoned until death overtakes them. '"

Whenever something is comprised of halaal and haraam the haraam always outweighs the halaal.

Classified fabricated by Al Haafidh Al Iraqi.

To look at a beautiful face improves ones eyesight and to look at an ugly face causes ones eyesight to fade.

Related by al Khataab and classified fabricated by Ibn Hibaan.

To look at the face of a beautiful woman and green vegetation improves ones eyesight.

Related by Abu Na’eem and classified fabricated by adhDhahaabee.

The above mentioned khabar encourages Muslim men to stare at

beautiful women which is something Allah 3 has forbidden in the Holy Qur’an. In Surah Noor verse 30-31 Allah 3% said’
content_id:
Abu Dardaa (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Pada Hari Kiamat kalian akan dipanggil dengan nama-nama kalian dan nama-nama ayah kalian, maka berikanlah nama-nama yang baik kepada anak-anak kalian."

Adapun pertanyaan yang belum terjawab, apa yang terjadi pada anak-anak haram yang salah dinisbahkan kepada ayah yang bukan ayah mereka oleh ibu-ibu mereka? Jawabannya dapat ditemukan dalam hadis Abu Dawud di atas — yakni mereka akan dipanggil dengan nama mereka sendiri daripada nama ayah-ayah mereka.

HADIS 52: Terung (eggplant) adalah obat untuk semua penyakit.

Diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ibnu Hajar Al-Asqalani.

Hadis palsu ini bertentangan dengan sabda autentik Nabi ﷺ: "Habbatussauda adalah obat untuk semua penyakit kecuali As-Sam." Aisyah (ra) bertanya: "Apakah As-Sam itu?" Nabi ﷺ menjawab: "Kematian."

Hendaklah yang paling tampan di antara kalian yang memimpin salat karena ia lebih mungkin memiliki akhlak yang terbaik; dan gunakanlah kekayaanmu untuk melindungi kehormatanmu serta jagalah agamamu dengan menjaga lisanmu.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Adiy dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ibnu Jawzi.

Yang seharusnya dijadikan kriteria dalam memilih imam salat bukanlah ketampanan fisik melainkan penguasaan Al-Quran dan kualitas agamanya. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Yang paling berhak menjadi imam suatu kaum adalah yang paling banyak hafalan Al-Qurannya."

Barangsiapa bepergian pada hari Jumat, dua malaikat berdoa kepadanya agar tidak ada yang menemaninya dalam perjalanan dan agar ia tidak mencapai tujuan dan maksudnya.

Sanadnya tidak sahih. Bepergian pada hari Jumat tidak dilarang secara umum, namun seseorang tidak boleh berangkat setelah azan Jumat telah dikumandangkan, karena wajib baginya untuk hadir ke salat Jumat terlebih dahulu jika ia wajib melaksanakannya.

Sesungguhnya setiap sesuatu memiliki hati dan hati Al-Quran adalah Yasin; barangsiapa membacanya, Allah ﷻ akan menuliskan baginya pahala sepuluh kali membaca Al-Quran.

Diriwayatkan oleh At-Tirmidzi dan diklasifikasikan lemah atau sangat lemah oleh para ulama hadis. Keutamaan Surah Yasin yang disebutkan dalam beberapa hadis lainnya pun diperselisihkan para ulama.

Barangsiapa memungut bayaran untuk mengajar, berarti ia telah menjual Al-Quran.

Diriwayatkan oleh beberapa ulama dengan sanad yang lemah. Mayoritas ulama memperbolehkan mengambil upah untuk mengajar Al-Quran berdasarkan dalil-dalil yang sahih. Nabi ﷺ sendiri bersabda: "Sesungguhnya yang paling berhak kalian ambil upahnya adalah Kitab Allah."

Wudu di atas wudu adalah cahaya di atas cahaya.

Diriwayatkan oleh beberapa rawi dan diperselisihkan keasliannya. Sebagian ulama menganggapnya lemah dan sebagian mengganggapnya dapat diterima. Memperbarui wudu memiliki dasar yang kuat dalam ajaran Islam meskipun hadis ini khususnya diperdebatkan.

Ghibah membatalkan wudu dan salat.

Diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu. Ghibah adalah dosa besar yang sangat dilarang, namun tidak membatalkan wudu secara fiqih. Wudu batal hanya oleh perkara-perkara yang ditetapkan oleh syariat.

Sesungguhnya yang bukan penutur bahasa Arab...

Hadis-hadis yang mengandung sentimen negatif berdasarkan bahasa atau ras adalah hadis-hadis palsu yang bertentangan dengan prinsip Islam tentang kesetaraan manusia. Nabi ﷺ bersabda dalam Haji Wada': "Tidak ada keutamaan bagi orang Arab atas non-Arab kecuali dengan ketakwaan."
content_ar:
يتناول هذا الجزء قضايا متعلقة بالأسماء وأثرها في حياة المسلم يوم القيامة، مستنداً إلى الأحاديث الصحيحة الثابتة، ومنبّهاً على ما شاع من الأحاديث الموضوعة في هذا الباب.

التسمي بالأسماء الحسنة يوم القيامة

روى أبو الدرداء رضي الله عنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: "إنكم تُدعون يوم القيامة بأسمائكم وأسماء آبائكم فأحسنوا أسماءكم"، رواه أبو داود وصحّحه جماعة. وهذا الحديث الصحيح يدل على أهمية اختيار الأسماء الحسنة المعبّرة عن القيم الإسلامية السامية.

مسألة أبناء الزنا يوم القيامة

من المسائل الدقيقة التي يتساءل عنها الناس: ما حكم الأطفال الذين نُسبوا نسبةً خاطئة إلى غير آبائهم الحقيقيين؟ والجواب أن الله سبحانه وتعالى هو العدل الحكيم الذي لا يظلم أحداً، وأن يوم القيامة يوم يُكشف فيه كل شيء ويُعطى كل ذي حق حقه. وقد أشار العلماء إلى أن مثل هؤلاء الأطفال لا يتحمّلون وزر نسبة مشكوك فيها، وأن الله لن يحاسبهم على ما لم يكن لهم فيه خيار.

العدل الإلهي ومبدأ عدم المؤاخذة بجريرة الغير

من الأصول القرآنية الثابتة قوله تعالى: {وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَى} [الأنعام: 164]، وهذا يعني أن الإنسان لا يُحاسب إلا على ما اكتسب بنفسه، لا على ما ارتكبه غيره. وهذا المبدأ العدلي يُطمئن النفوس بأن الله سبحانه لن يُؤاخذ الطفل البريء على فعل أبيه أو أمه.

أثر الاسم في تشكيل الهوية

للاسم أثر تربوي ونفسي بالغ في تشكيل هوية الشخص وتوجيه سلوكه، ولهذا اهتمت الشريعة الإسلامية بالتسمية اهتماماً خاصاً. ومن الأسماء المحبوبة في الإسلام:

  • الأسماء المقرونة بالعبودية لله: عبدالله، عبدالرحمن، عبدالعزيز.
  • أسماء الأنبياء: محمد، إبراهيم، موسى، عيسى، يوسف.
  • أسماء الصحابة الكرام رضي الله عنهم.

ومن الأسماء المنهي عنها: ما كان فيه تزكية كـ"برّة" و"تقي"، وما كان له معنى سيئ أو مستهجن.

خلاصة وتوجيه

ينبغي للوالدين أن يُحسنا اختيار اسم مولودهما، لأن الاسم هوية مدى الحياة وأمانة في أعناقهما. والاستنارة بالأحاديث الصحيحة الثابتة في هذا الباب خير وأسلم من اتباع الأحاديث الموضوعة أو الضعيفة التي تُبالغ في وعود لا أصل لها في الشريعة. والله تعالى أعلم بما يصلح العباد وما يُقرّبهم إليه.
